name: coordinator-stall-on-merge
description: Coordinators may complete all agent work (groups auto-close) but stall before sending result mail or merging branches. When a coordinator's last activity is >10 min stale and its task group shows completed, stop it, restart, and dispatch a targeted merge request with the branch name and file list.
Schema migration adding coordinator_name column to SQLite runs table broke all running ov commands after merge — the live process had the old DB without the new column.
resolution: Delete sessions.db and restart. Prevention: migrations should be backwards-compatible or coordinator should restart after merging schema-changing branches.

name: lead-self-verify-7-file-ui-tokens
description: Lead self-verification scales to 7-file UI tokens migration (overstory-d361): for mechanical multi-file changes (className/CSS edits across UI primitives + design tokens), the moderate self-verify pattern (mx-37af51, mx-2d761d) extends to 7 files. Single builder, detailed spec with verified context corrections (e.g. data-slot already present so only data-variant missing), full diff review (+21/-13 lines), and quality gates run from builder's worktree. The PreToolUse review-skip warning fires but is informational. Key lever: lead reads the actual files BEFORE writing the spec to catch divergence between issue text and current code.

content: Lead spec writing: PreToolUse hook blocks lead Write/Edit, so leads must pipe spec body into 'ov spec write TASK-ID --agent LEAD'. The spec lands in the canonical repo .overstory/specs directory (not the lead worktree), so 'ov sling --spec' must use an absolute path. A worktree-relative path fails with VALIDATION_ERROR because the lead worktree has no specs subdir of its own.
